title: Figure 21 from: Wiklund H, Taylor JD, Dahlgren TG, Todt C, Ikebe C, Rabone M, Glover AG (2017) Abyssal fauna of the UK-1 polymetallic nodule exploration area, Clarion-Clipperton Zone, central Pacific Ocean: Mollusca. ZooKeys 707: 1-46. https://doi.org/10.3897/zookeys.707.13042
author: Wiklund, Helena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Figure 21 - 
                      
                        Leptochiton macleani Sirenko, 2015. NHM_446 voucher specimen. A Live specimen (lateral view) after recovery from the ROV scoop sample B Preserved specimen (ventro-lateral view) following DNA extraction C Dorsal view D surface detail E SEM of tegmentum surface and pores. Scale bars: 4 mm (A); 0.5 mm (D); 0.3 mm (E). Image attribution Glover, Taylor, Ikebe, Dahlgren & Wiklund, 2017.
